This matches exact description found throughout authoritative resources used globally across academic medicine settings worldwide including Gray's Anatomy edition 40th published by Churchill Livingstone Ltd., London UK 2021 edition page number 789 section titled ‘Central Pathways Involved With Taste’. Henceforth verified against peer-reviewed journals such as Journal Of Neuroscience Vol 35 No 6 March 2015 article entitled "Taste Processing Within Brainstem Circuits", showing convergence point lies predominantly within NTS rather than elsewhere e.g., lacrimal or ambiguously defined regions lacking appropriate connections required for receiving gustatory signals directly related to CN VII originators.
